# Code Review Skill

代码审查清单和 PR 规范。

## PR 提交规范

### PR 标题格式
```
<type>(<scope>): <description>

示例:
feat(auth): 添加 OAuth2.0 登录功能
fix(api): 修复用户列表分页问题
refactor(db): 优化查询性能
```

### PR 描述模板
```markdown
## 变更说明
简要描述本次变更的内容和目的

## 变更类型
- [ ] 新功能
- [ ] Bug 修复
- [ ] 重构
- [ ] 性能优化
- [ ] 文档更新

## 关联 Issue
Closes #123

## 测试说明
- [ ] 单元测试通过
- [ ] 集成测试通过
- [ ] 手动测试通过

## 截图（如适用）
UI 变更请附截图

## 检查清单
- [ ] 代码符合项目规范
- [ ] 已添加必要的测试
- [ ] 已更新相关文档
- [ ] 无敏感信息泄露
```

## 代码审查清单

### 功能正确性
- [ ] 代码实现了预期功能
- [ ] 边界条件处理正确
- [ ] 错误处理完善
- [ ] 无明显的逻辑漏洞

### 代码质量
- [ ] 命名清晰有意义
- [ ] 函数职责单一
- [ ] 无重复代码
- [ ] 复杂逻辑有注释
- [ ] 无硬编码的魔法数字

### 安全性
- [ ] 输入验证完整
- [ ] 无 SQL 注入风险
- [ ] 无 XSS 风险
- [ ] 敏感信息已脱敏
- [ ] 权限检查到位

### 性能
- [ ] 无 N+1 查询
- [ ] 无不必要的循环
- [ ] 大数据量有分页
- [ ] 耗时操作有缓存或异步

### 可维护性
- [ ] 代码结构清晰
- [ ] 依赖关系合理
- [ ] 易于测试
- [ ] 易于扩展

## 审查反馈规范

### 评论分类
```
[必须] 必须修改才能合并
[建议] 建议修改，可讨论
[疑问] 需要解释或讨论
[赞] 写得好的地方
```

### 反馈示例
```
[必须] 这里存在 SQL 注入风险，请使用参数化查询

[建议] 这个函数超过 50 行，建议拆分为更小的函数

[疑问] 为什么这里用 setTimeout 而不是 debounce？

[赞] 这个抽象设计得很好，复用性强
```

## 审查流程

```
┌─────────────┐
│  提交 PR    │
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  CI 检查    │ ← 自动化测试、lint、构建
└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  代码审查   │ ← 至少 1 人 approve

┌─────────────┐

└──────┬──────┘
       ▼
┌─────────────┐
│  合并代码   │ ← Squash merge
└─────────────┘
```

### 审查者
- 及时响应（24小时内）
- 提供建设性反馈
- 尊重作者的设计决策
- 区分必须修改和建议修改

### 作者
- PR 尽量小（<400行）
- 提供充分的上下文
- 积极回应反馈
- 不要 defensive

  /export/tasks/{taskId}/cancel:
    post:
      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Cancel export task
      description: |
        PENDING tasks can be canceled immediately. EXECUTING tasks accept cancel
        intent and still return EXECUTING until the worker closes the task at a
        batch boundary. The API never returns an internal cancel marker as a task status.
      operationId: cancelExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"

      tags: [ExportTasks]
      summary: Retry failed export task
      description: |
        Only FAILED tasks are retryable. Retry keeps the original taskId,
        reuses the original config snapshot, increments attemptNo and creates no
        second active execution attempt.
      operationId: retryExportTask
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOperatorId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRoleCodes"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XOrgScope"

      responses:
        "200":
          description: Retry accepted.
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskActionResponseEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/InvalidTaskState"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/ActiveAttemptConflict"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/AuthContextMissing"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/TaskNotFound"
  /export/registries:

      parameters:

        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XTenantId"

        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/XRequestId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportRegistryUpsertRequest"
            examples:
              purchaseOrderRegistry:
                value:
                  taskCode: purchase-order-export
                  subsystemCode: purchase
                  displayName: Purchase order export
                  enabled: true
                  concurrencyLimit: 3
                  fileRetentionDays: 15
                  taskHistoryRetentionDays: 30
                  singleFileMaxRows: 20000
                  exportMaxRows: 100000
                  supportedFormats: [XLSX, ZIP]
                  datasourceCode: purchase_ro
                  parameterSchema:
                    required: [createdAtRange]
                    properties:
                      createdAtRange:
                        type: object
                      orderStatus:
                        type: string
                      supplierId:
                        type: string
                      purchaseOrgId:
                        type: string
                      keyword:
                        type: string
                  queryTemplate:
                    queryTemplateVersion: v1
                    templateText: "select ... where created_at between :createdAtFrom and :createdAtTo order by order_id asc"
                    allowedParameters: [createdAtFrom, createdAtTo, orderStatus, supplierId, purchaseOrgId, keyword]
                  fieldMappings:
                    - fieldCode: orderNo
                      headerName: Order No
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 1
                      sensitive: false
                      exportable: true
                    - fieldCode: contactPhone
                      headerName: Contact Phone
                      fieldType: STRING
                      orderNo: 10
                      sensitive: true
                      exportable: true
                      maskingRuleCode: phone_mask
                  dataScopeTemplate: "tenant_id = :tenantId and org_id in (:orgScope)"
                  cursorField: orderId
                  orderBy:
                    - field: orderId
                      direction: ASC
                  batchSize: 1000

        "400":

        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/PermissionDenied"

components:
  securitySchemes:
    AuthContext:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Request-Id
      description: |
        The gateway or caller must forward the full auth context headers defined
        by X-Operator-Id, X-Tenant-Id, X-Role-Codes, X-Org-Scope and X-Request-Id.
  parameters:
    XOperatorId:
      name: X-Operator-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Authenticated operator id.
    XTenantId:
      name: X-Tenant-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Tenant id for task visibility and data scope.
    XRoleCodes:
      name: X-Role-Codes
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Comma-separated role codes.
    XOrgScope:
      name: X-Org-Scope
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Organization scope expression or encoded scope list.
    XRequestId:
      name: X-Request-Id
      in: header
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
      description: Upstream request id used by audit logs and task events.
    TaskId:
      name: taskId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    TaskCode:
      name: taskCode
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
  responses:
    ValidationError:
      description: Validation failed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            validation:
              value:
                code: VALIDATION_ERROR
                message: validation failed
                data: null
                errors:
                  - field: taskCode
                    reason: required
    AuthContextMissing:
      description: Required auth context is missing or malformed.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            authMissing:
              value:
                code: AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
                message: auth context missing
                data: null
    PermissionDenied:
      description: Operator has no permission for the task, registry or file.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            denied:
              value:
                code: PERMISSION_DENIED
                message: permission denied
                data: null
    TaskNotFound:
      description: Task not found or invisible to current operator.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notFound:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_FOUND
                message: task not found
                data: null
    TaskNotRegistered:
      description: taskCode is not registered.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            notRegistered:
              value:
                code: TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
                message: task code not registered
                data: null
    QueryParamsTooLarge:
      description: queryParams exceeds the 32KB default limit.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            tooLarge:
              value:
                code: QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
                message: queryParams exceeds 32768 bytes
                data: null
    IdempotencyConflict:
      description: Same idempotency scope with different request digest.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            conflict:
              value:
                code: IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
                message: clientRequestId conflicts with a different request digest
                data:
                  idempotencyScope: tenant-001:u001:purchase-order-export:req-20260513-0001
    InvalidTaskState:
      description: Operation is not allowed for current official task status.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            invalidRetry:
              value:
                code: INVALID_TASK_STATE
                message: current task status does not allow this operation
                data:
                  status: EXECUTING
    ActiveAttemptConflict:
      description: Another active execution attempt already exists.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            activeAttempt:
              value:
                code: ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
                message: active execution attempt already exists
                data:
                  taskId: exp_20260513_000001
                  attemptNo: 1
    FileExpired:
      description: File is expired or marked as not downloadable.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            expired:
              value:
                code: FILE_EXPIRED
                message: file expired
                data: null
    RegistryConflict:
      description: Registry taskCode already exists or conflicts with immutable fields.
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope"
          examples:
            duplicate:
              value:
                code: REGISTRY_CONFLICT
                message: taskCode already exists
                data: null
  schemas:
    ResponseCode:
      type: string
      enum:
        - SUCCESS
        - VALIDATION_ERROR
        - AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING
        - PERMISSION_DENIED
        - TASK_NOT_FOUND
        - TASK_NOT_REGISTERED
        - TASK_DISABLED
        - QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE
        - IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT
        - INVALID_TASK_STATE
        - FILE_EXPIRED
        - FILE_NOT_READY
        - FILE_VERIFY_ERROR
        - QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID
        - DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
        - QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR
        - FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID
        - MASKING_RULE_ERROR
        - EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR
        - EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED
        - REGISTRY_CONFLICT
        - ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT
        - INTERNAL_ERROR
    TaskStatus:
      type: string
      description: Official public task status. Internal cancel flags are not valid values.
      enum: [PENDING, EXECUTING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELED, EXPIRED]
    FileFormat:
      type: string
      enum: [XLSX, ZIP]
    DeliveryMode:
      type: string
      enum: [SIGNED_URL, STREAM]
    Envelope:
      type: object
      required: [code, message]
      properties:
        code:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        message:
          type: string
    ErrorEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          properties:
            data:
              type: object
              nullable: true
              additionalProperties: true
            errors:
              type: array
              items:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/FieldError"
    FieldError:
      type: object
      required: [field, reason]
      properties:
        field:
          type: string
        reason:
          type: string
    CreateExportTaskRequest:
      type: object
      required: [taskCode, subsystemCode, fileFormat, queryParams]
      properties:
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
          maxLength: 128
          description: Optional idempotency key scoped by tenantId/operatorId/taskCode.
        queryParams:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true
          description: Must match registry parameter schema and must not exceed 32768 bytes after canonical JSON serialization.
        deliveryPreference:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
    CreateExportTaskResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateExportTaskResponse"
    CreateExportTaskResponse:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - attemptNo
        - createdAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [PENDING]
        clientRequestId:
          type: string
        idempotencyHit:
          type: boolean
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
    ExportTaskDetailEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
    ExportTaskDetail:
      type: object
      required:
        - taskId
        - taskCode
        - subsystemCode
        - status
        - totalCount
        - processedCount
        - progressPercent
        - attemptNo
        - requestId
        - requestDigest
        - configSnapshotDigest
        - createdBy
        - createdAt
        - updatedAt
      properties:
        taskId:
          type: string
        taskCode:
          type: string
        subsystemCode:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskStatus"
        totalCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        processedCount:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          minimum: 0
        progressPercent:
          type: number
          minimum: 0
          maximum: 100
        fileFormat:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileFormat"
        attemptNo:
          type: integer
          minimum: 0
        errorCode:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ResponseCode"
        errorMessage:
          type: string
        failureStage:
          type: string
        lastSuccessStage:
          type: string
        requestId:
          type: string
        requestDigest:
          type: string
        configSnapshotDigest:
          type: string
        createdBy:
          type: string
        createdAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updatedAt:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        file:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        batchCheckpoint:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/BatchCheckpoint"
        recentEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/TaskEvent"
        auditEvents:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AuditEvent"
    ExportTaskPageEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskPage"
    ExportTaskPage:
      type: object
      required: [items, page, pageSize, total]
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ExportTaskDetail"
        page:
          type: integer
        pageSize:
          type: integer
        total:
          type: integer
          format: int64
    DownloadResponseEnvelope:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/Envelope"
        - type: object
          required: [data]
          properties:
            data:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DownloadResponse"
    DownloadResponse:
      allOf:
        - $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileMetadata"
        - type: object
          required: [deliveryMode]
          properties:
            deliveryMode:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeliveryMode"
            downloadUrl:
              type: string
              format: uri
            expiresAt:
              type: string
              format: date-time
    FileMetadata:
      type: object
      required:
        - fileName

        - storageKey

      properties:
        fileName:
          type: string
        fileSize:

+| `/api/export/tasks` | `GET` | FR-004 / FR-009 / FR-010 | 正式筛选维度、普通用户仅本人、管理员按权限全局查询 |

+| `/api/export/tasks/{taskId}/retry` | `POST` | FR-012 / FR-013 / FR-010 | 仅 FAILED 可重试，沿用 `taskId` 和配置快照，递增 `attemptNo` |

+| `/api/export/registries/{taskCode}` | `GET` / `PUT` | FR-007 / FR-008 / FR-013 | 配置详情、更新与新任务快照口径 |

+## 3.4 对外状态和错误码
+
+对外任务状态只能使用 `PENDING`、`EXECUTING`、`COMPLETED`、`FAILED`、`CANCELED`、`EXPIRED`。执行中取消意图只能通过动作响应字段表达，不得作为任务状态返回。
+
+| 错误码 | 默认 HTTP 状态 | 场景 |
+| --- | --- | --- |
+| `VALIDATION_ERROR` | 400 | 参数校验失败 |
+| `AUTH_CONTEXT_MISSING` | 401 | 缺少 `operatorId`、`tenantId`、`roleCodes`、`orgScope` 或 `requestId` |
+| `PERMISSION_DENIED` | 403 | 创建、查询、下载或配置操作无权限 |
+| `TASK_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | 任务不存在或对当前用户不可见 |
+| `TASK_NOT_REGISTERED` | 404 | `taskCode` 未注册 |
+| `TASK_DISABLED` | 400 | `taskCode` 已禁用 |
+| `QUERY_PARAMS_TOO_LARGE` | 413 | `queryParams` 超过 32KB 默认限制 |
+| `IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 相同幂等范围但参数摘要不同 |
+| `INVALID_TASK_STATE` | 400 | 当前状态不允许下载、取消或重试 |
+| `ACTIVE_ATTEMPT_CONFLICT` | 409 | 已存在活跃执行尝试 |
+| `FILE_EXPIRED` | 410 | 文件已过期或已标记不可下载 |
+| `FILE_NOT_READY` | 400 | 文件未发布或任务尚未完成 |
+| `FILE_VERIFY_ERROR` | 500 | OSS 上传、元信息或校验失败 |
+| `QUERY_TEMPLATE_INVALID` | 500 | 查询模板不存在、不合法或与快照冲突 |
+| `DATASOURCE_UNAVAILABLE` | 500 | 数据源或凭证不可用 |
+| `QUERY_EXECUTION_ERROR` | 500 | 查询执行失败、批次重试耗尽或游标异常 |
+| `FIELD_MAPPING_INVALID` | 500 | 字段映射、字段顺序或字段白名单不合法 |
+| `MASKING_RULE_ERROR` | 500 | 脱敏策略配置或执行失败 |
+| `EXPORT_RENDER_ERROR` | 500 | XLSX/ZIP 渲染失败 |
+| `EXPORT_LIMIT_EXCEEDED` | 400 | 超过默认或配置化最大导出量 |
+| `REGISTRY_CONFLICT` | 409 | 注册 `taskCode` 冲突 |
+| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | 未分类服务端错误 |
